themes: Toyota named Highmark Stadium founding partner
writeup: New wide receiver DJ Moore spoke openly about building chemistry with Josh Allen during voluntary OTAs, expressing confidence in the connection developing under head coach Joe Brady's system. Offensive coordinator Pete Carmichael held his first extended press conference, laying out his offensive philosophy and how he plans to deploy a fully healthy Dalton Kincaid. Toyota was formally announced as a Founding Partner of Highmark Stadium, joining a growing roster of corporate supporters.
